name: Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
Heat the oven to 375 degrees F. Mix the 1 cup of biscuit baking mix and milk until a soft dough forms. Gently roll out the dough into a circle larger than an inverted 9-inch pie pan. Place in the pan and flute the edges.
1 lb Lean Ground Beef
1/2 onion, chopped
1/4 tsp Salt
1/4 tsp Pepper
2 tbsp Bisquick Baking Mix
2 tbsp Worcestershire Sauce
Cook the meat and onion in a large skillet until browned. Drain excess fat. Stir in salt, pepper, 2 tablespoons of baking mix, and Worcestershire sauce.
Arrange tomato slices over the meat mixture. Beat eggs slightly and stir in cheese. Spread evenly over tomatoes.
Bake for about 30 minutes. Cut into wedges and serve with chili sauce if desired.
